extract.message:
Hey! We're sorry you ran into an error. 
Stagehand version: 2.5.8 
If you need help, please open a Github issue or reach out to us on Slack: https://stagehand.dev/slack

Full error:
Invalid schema for response_format 'response': In context=('properties', 'properties', 'items'), 'required' is required to be supplied and to be an array including every key in properties. Missing 'property_address'.
